text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "lsass.exe modified the HKLM\\SAM\\SAM\\Domains\\Account\\Users\\000003E9\\F registry key, which is highly unusual and indicative of credential dumping or manipulation. While lsass.exe manages authentication, it typically does not directly write to the SAM hive in this manner.",
  "indicators": [
    "lsass.exe",
    "reg_set",
    "HKLM\\SAM\\SAM\\Domains\\Account\\Users\\000003E9\\F",
    "credential dumping",
    "SAM hive modification"
  ]
}
